notes:
JQW NBL2 cell-membrane model (cellpose-SAM finetune v7). Trained on raw uint16 intensity-sum TIFs (NOT the FastFLIM render). Cellprob heavily negative because membrane signal is sparse; merge_fragments closes thin gaps and filters small spurious CCs.

Deploy: copy this file as <model_dir>/config.json (one level above models/<model_name>). Plugin auto-discovers it and pre-fills the N or P diameter spinbox + threads cellprob/flow + post-proc through the cellpose subprocess.
